headline: Walt Disney Has Been a Streaming Story for Years. Here's How The Story Has Changed.
summary: After a decade of poor investment returns, investors should be excited for Disney's next chapter.

raw.headline: Walt Disney Has Been a Streaming Story for Years. Here's How The Story Has Changed.

headline: Disney Directors Buy More Shares As Valuation And Targets Draw Focus
summary: Disney directors Elena Maria Lagomasino and Michael Froman recently purchased additional NYSE:DIS shares on the open market. The insider buying comes with Disney shares around $96.61, drawing attention to management's direct exposure to the stock. These director purchases add a fresh data point for shareholders watching governance and insider sentiment at Walt Disney. For investors tracking NYSE:DIS, this insider buying lands at a time when the stock trades near $96.61 and has had a mixed...
